doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains fabricated citations, an impossible supersession reference (EDPB did not exist in 2014), and a legal position directly contradicting established GDPR doctrine on pseudonymization, all dressed in authentic-looking insti
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This document contains multiple fabricated elements: the EDPB has issued no such "Guidance Note 04/2026," the cited "EDPB Guidance 05/2014 on anonymization techniques" is not a real EDPB document (the EDPB succeeded the WP29 only in 2018), the IAB Europe case C-604/22 does not concern pseudonymization in this way, and the substantive legal position stated—that pseudonymized data is outside GDPR scope for non-key holders—directly contradicts established EDPB/WP29 doctrine and GDPR Recital 26, making this a plausibly formatted but fabricated institutional document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contains fabricated citations, an impossible supersession reference (EDPB did not exist in 2014), and a legal position directly contradicting established GDPR doctrine on pseudonymization, all dressed in authentic-looking institutional formatting.
